consumerTone: plain English; novelty ancestry education only; no Santa/St. Nick relationship, similarity score, identity, child inference, exact-origin, ethnicity-percentage, family-tree, relative-matching, or health claims

missingInputPolicy: Mark Santa/St. Nick comparison sample, relationship model, similarity score, relative matching, family-tree placement, identity, child-specific interpretation, exact percentage, exact homeland, community affiliation, and health interpretation unavailable when not explicitly supplied. Use sibling Gene2me sample admixture percentages, maps, region narratives, and country/subregion table structure only as observed output-format examples.
